perks.summary: init the DEFT AOI state, then run the train/retrain/mine/gate loop until the KPI target is met (destructive)
sweep thresholds over a ChangeNet inference CSV and pick the FAR @ 100%-recall operating point (read-only)
validate an assembled ChangeNet training CSV (schema, on-disk paths, label case, train/val leakage) before training
build the ChangeNet (input, golden, label, object_name) CSV from paired NG/OK image directories
render best_model.json + best_model_inference_spec.yaml from a finished run's deft_state.json
